name: Venara, the Unbroken Thread
description:
Venara, the Unbroken Thread

*{Lore In hearths where silence speaks louder than words and hands clasped in storm weather the fiercest gales, the Unbroken Thread reigns. She is the quiet strength in a lover's grip, the vow renewed at dawn, the wound soothed by a presence that asks nothing in return. Where Livaea binds through hunger, Venara binds through being—teaching that true love is not a leash worn willingly, but a shelter built stone by stone, breath by breath. Her followers learn that the deepest intimacy lives not in fevered whispers, but in the shared breath after tears, the mended tear in a shared cloak, the choice to stay when leaving would be easier.*

Venara is a patron of love as sanctuary—not the ecstasy of union, but the quiet courage of remaining. She rejects possession; her greatest teaching is that to love is to hold space for another's wholeness, even when it costs you. To serve her is to become a harbor: steady, unwavering, and strangely empty when the ship sails—yet fuller for having held it. In the infirmaries of battle-scarred cities, in the kitchens of refugee caravans, in the night vigils beside dying friends, Venara's influence is felt. Her cults are the Mended Circle, whose members exchange not blood, but strips of cloth from garments worn through shared hardship. Her witches are midwives who calm laboring mothers with hummed lullabies, neighbors who leave bread on doorsteps without expectation, and elders who recall forgotten names to soothe the lonely. To serve Venara is to understand that love's truest magic is not in changing another, but in being changed by them.

quote "A bond forged in presence needs no seal. When you stay because you choose to—not because you must—you become the anchor that lets another soul find its tide." quote

*{Domain Focus itemize Steadfast Bonding: oaths of loyalty, healing through presence, enduring commitments Nurturing Presence: active listening, emotional holding space, comfort through proximity Rituals of Care: shared meals, mending crafts, vigils, the sacred ordinary Healing Through Connection: soothing distress, restoring trust after fracture, communal resilience itemize*

*{Thiasos and Codex (Runekeeper Options)*

A Runekeeper sworn to Venara does not bind a creature of claw or fang—they bind a companion of quiet devotion. Their Thiasos is a small being of constancy: a pair of lovebirds that preen each other's feathers in silence, a stone that stays warm when held between two palms, a moth whose wings bear the imprint of two touching fingers, or a sprout that grows only when watered by shared tears. This creature requires no food, but it must be given a token of shared presence each day (a pressed flower from a joint walk, a sip from the same cup, a moment of silent eye-contact). If neglected for a week, it becomes Compromised (its aura of calm turns heavy, imposing --1 die on all Sway rolls involving genuine empathy for its bearer until offered a fresh token of mutual presence).

The Codex of Venara is never a book of dry ink. It may be a braided cord whose knots tighten with each shared hardship, a collection of mended garments whose patches tell stories of repair, a hollow stone filled with rainwater that reflects both holders' faces, or a journal where each page bears the fingerprints of two hands writing in turn. Because Venara's truths are written in shared silence, the Codex requires upkeep: the Runekeeper must spend an hour each week sitting in quiet companionship with another (speaking no more than three sentences total), or the Rites stored there fade (treat as Compromised until re-silenced).

*{Patron's Gift (Imbuement)*

Once per scene as an action, a Runekeeper of Venara may touch a held item (weapon, tool, or garment) and breathe a single word of "remain". For the rest of the scene, the item grants +1 die to Sway or Medicine rolls, and the first time each scene the bearer makes eye contact with a target they wish to comfort, the target must test Resolve (DV 3) or feel a wave of profound ease (suffer --1 die to resist the bearer's next supportive action). After the scene, the user marks +1 Obligation to Venara.
summary: Venara, the Unbroken Thread *{Lore In hearths where silence speaks louder than words and hands clasped in storm weather the fiercest gales, the Unbroken Thread reigns. She is the quiet strength in a lover's grip, the vow renewed at dawn, the wound soothed by a presence that asks nothing in return.

rites.name: Rite of the Shared Breath
rites.description: (Basic, 4 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , Materials: Two cups filled from the same source, or a strip of cloth worn against both heartbeats. Effect: Your quiet presence becomes a balm. Gain +1 die to Sway one target in a supportive conversation. The target feels a subtle lifting of burden; they are more likely to confide a worry. Push It: The target feels safe enough to name a fear they've hidden (a secret weakness, a past failure). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Your quiet presence becomes a balm. Gain +1 die to Sway one target in a supportive conversation. The target feels a subtle lifting of burden; they are more likely to confide a worry. \

rites.name: Rite of the Mended Cloth
rites.description: (Basic, 5 XP) Scene; Touch; No. Tags: , , Materials: A torn garment or cloth, needle and thread touched to both participants' lips. Effect: Create a temporary bond of mutual care. Both parties gain +1 die when aiding each other in acts of nurturing (Medicine, Craft, Sway). The bond manifests as a shared warmth, like sunlight on wool. Push It: The bond deepens to shared vulnerability; both sense when the other is hiding pain but suffer --1 die to conceal their own distress. The bond may persist as a gentle ache until the next dusk. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Create a temporary bond of mutual care. Both parties gain +1 die when aiding each other in acts of nurturing (Medicine, Craft, Sway). The bond manifests as a shared warmth, like sunlight on wool. \

rites.name: Rite of the Unbroken Vow
rites.description: (Advanced, 8 XP) Scene; Near; Yes. Tags: , , , Materials: Token exchanged between parties — a knot tied from both hairs, a cup shared at dawn and dusk, or a stone warmed by mutual grip. Effect: Forge a promise of enduring presence. Both gain +1 Effect when cooperating in acts of care or healing; breach inflicts 1 SB (Hearts) and a hollow ache where warmth once was (the oathbreaker feels inexplicable loneliness amid company). Create a 6-segment Vow Strength timer. Push It: Breach also causes a visible withdrawal (a reluctance to meet eyes, a tendency to fade from gatherings, or an inability to accept comfort). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Timer: 6 segments.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Timer: 6 segments.
rites.effect: Forge a promise of enduring presence. Both gain +1 Effect when cooperating in acts of care or healing; breach inflicts 1 SB (Hearts) and a hollow ache where warmth once was (the oathbreaker feels inexplicable loneliness amid company). Create a 6-segment Vow Strength timer. \

rites.name: Rite of the Hearth's Embrace
rites.description: (Advanced, 7 XP) Scene; Self; No. Tags: , , Materials: A blanket shared during storytelling, or a meal prepared while humming a tune of quiet joy. Effect: Assume an aura of profound calm and magnetic steadiness. Gain +2 dice to Sway or Medicine in settings of distress or vulnerability. Your presence lingers in the memory like a safe harbor remembered in storm. Push It: Become the emotional anchor; all who seek comfort gravitate toward you with +1 Effect. Those who confide in you may feel a shiver of relief (Resolve DV 2 to resist sharing deeper burdens). Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). Invoke: 1 action. Duration: Scene.
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +2) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +1 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar + Codex (Invoke: 1 Boon). \ Invoke: 1 action. \ Duration: Scene.
rites.effect: Assume an aura of profound calm and magnetic steadiness. Gain +2 dice to Sway or Medicine in settings of distress or vulnerability. Your presence lingers in the memory like a safe harbor remembered in storm. \

rites.name: Rite of the Mended Circle
rites.description: (Master, 14 XP) Extended; Zone; No. Tags: , , , , Materials: A circle of stones, each touched by a participant's tear; a shared loaf broken and passed hand to hand; a vial of water mixed from each person's source. Effect: You become the heart of a healing zone. For the scene: itemize You gain +1 Effect on all social rolls focused on care or healing, and opponents suffer --1 die when attempting to sow discord. Anyone who attempts to deceive you about their emotional state must test Resolve (DV 4) or reveal a hidden pain --1 die on their next action as guilt wells up. Allies who share food or drink from the communal offerings regain 1 Fatigue (the bread of shared burden, warm and sustaining). itemize Start a 10-segment Circle of Care timer; when it fills, you may declare one irrevocable communal judgment (e.g., no harsh words spoken here for one week," we will tend the sick together," this space is sanctuary from judgment") that the zone's inhabitants will uphold for one month. Those who defy it feel a phantom heaviness in their chest, as if carrying an unspoken grief. Push It: Newcomers must test Resolve (DV 4) or become briefly inclined toward peace -- they will accept one simple act of care, such as share your bread with the hungry" or "sit in silence with the grieving." Cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). Invoke: Extended action. Duration: Timer: 10 segments (Circle of Care).
rites.cost: Mark +1 Obligation (total +3) or Mark +1 Fatigue. \ Cost: Mark +2 Obligation. \ Requires: Familiar + Codex + Tier III (Invoke: 2 Boons). \ Invoke: Extended action. \ Duration: Timer: 10 segments (Circle of Care).
